scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:services" "wait-on --timeout 60000 http-get://localhost:3001/health http-get://localhost:3002/health && npm run dev:client"
scripts.migrate:all: npm run migrate --workspace=services/auth; npm run migrate --workspace=services/user; npm run migrate --workspace=services/catalog; true
scripts.dev:services: npm run docker:up && npm run migrate:all && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user" "npm run dev --workspace=services/catalog" "npm run dev --workspace=services/playback" "npm run dev --workspace=services/recommendation"
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d db redis dynamodb-local
